required_env_vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_CALCOM_COACH_USERNAME
required_env_vars.description: Cal.com username for coach scheduling embed

required_env_vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_CALCOM_EVENT_SLUG
required_env_vars.description: Cal.com event type slug for coaching sessions (e.g., '60min')
required_env_vars.source: Cal.com settings → Event Types → Event slug

tasks.name: Create dashboard TypeScript types
tasks.purpose: Define TypeScript interfaces for all 7 widget data shapes to maintain type safety in loader and page components

dependencies: Database types for course_progress, survey_responses, tasks, building_blocks_submissions
constraints: Must export interfaces for: CourseProgressData, SurveyScoresData, KanbanSummaryData, RecentActivityData, QuickActionFlagsData, CoachingData, PresentationOutlinesData
Must export aggregate DashboardData type combining all 7 interfaces
Use Database['public']['Tables'] types for table row structures

tasks.output_state: New file apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts with 7 widget interfaces and 1 aggregate type
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exists with all 8 types exported and passes typecheck
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts && grep -c 'export interface' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts | grep -q '^8$' && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create loader skeleton with Promise.allSettled structure
tasks.purpose: Set up the loader file with server-only directive, cache wrapper, and Promise.allSettled pattern for resilient parallel queries

constraints: Must include 'use server-only' directive at top
Must wrap loader in React cache() for per-request memoization
Must use Promise.allSettled() for 7 parallel queries
Must accept userId parameter
Must return typed DashboardData with null values for failed queries

tasks.input_state: dashboard.types.ts file exists with DashboardData type
tasks.output_state: New file apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts with skeleton structure and 7 placeholder query functions
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exists with server-only directive, cache wrapper, Promise.allSettled structure, and passes typecheck

tasks.name: Add course progress query function
tasks.purpose: Query course_progress table to get user's enrolled courses and completion statistics

constraints: Must use RLS-protected Supabase client (not admin client)
Must filter by user_id = userId parameter
Must return null on error (graceful degradation)
Must select: id, course_id, completion_percentage, started_at, completed_at

tasks.input_state: Loader skeleton exists with placeholder for loadCourseProgress
tasks.output_state: loadCourseProgress function implemented and wired into Promise.allSettled array
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function queries course_progress table and returns CourseProgressData or null

tasks.name: Add survey scores query function
tasks.purpose: Query survey_responses table to get user's latest completed survey with category scores

constraints: Must use RLS-protected Supabase client
Must filter by user_id = userId AND completed = true
Must order by updated_at DESC and limit 1 (latest completed)
Must return null on error or if no completed surveys
Must select: id, category_scores, highest_scoring_category, lowest_scoring_category, updated_at

tasks.input_state: Loader skeleton exists with placeholder for loadSurveyScores
tasks.output_state: loadSurveyScores function implemented and wired into Promise.allSettled array
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function queries survey_responses table and returns latest completed survey or null

tasks.name: Add kanban tasks query function
tasks.purpose: Query tasks table to get user's active tasks (3 'doing' + 1 'do') for the kanban widget

constraints: Must use RLS-protected Supabase client
Must query tasks where status='doing' (limit 3) and status='do' (limit 1)
Must use two separate queries or single query with filtering in code
Must return null on error
Must select: id, title, description, status, priority, updated_at

tasks.input_state: Loader skeleton exists with placeholder for loadKanbanSummary
tasks.output_state: loadKanbanSummary function implemented with two filtered queries and wired into Promise.allSettled array
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function queries tasks table and returns up to 4 tasks (3 doing, 1 do) or null

tasks.name: Add recent activity query function
tasks.purpose: Query activity_events table to get user's latest 10 activity events ordered by created_at DESC

constraints: Must use RLS-protected Supabase client
Must filter by user_id = userId
Must order by created_at DESC and limit 10
Must return null on error or if table doesn't exist yet
Must select: id, event_type, title, entity_id, entity_type, metadata, created_at

tasks.input_state: Loader skeleton exists with placeholder for loadRecentActivity, activity_events table exists (from F2)
tasks.output_state: loadRecentActivity function implemented and wired into Promise.allSettled array
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function queries activity_events table and returns latest 10 events or null

tasks.name: Add quick actions and presentations query functions
tasks.purpose: Query existence flags for quick actions and fetch all presentation outlines for the outlines widget

dependencies: QuickActionFlagsData and PresentationOutlinesData types from dashboard.types.ts
constraints: loadQuickActionFlags: Must perform 3 existence checks (SELECT EXISTS) for hasStartedCourse, hasCompletedSurvey, hasCreatedPresentation
loadPresentationOutlines: Must query building_blocks_submissions table ordered by updated_at DESC
Must use RLS-protected Supabase client
Must return null on error for each function
CoachingData is a static config object (no query) - can be inline in loader

tasks.input_state: Loader skeleton exists with placeholders for loadQuickActionFlags and loadPresentationOutlines
tasks.output_state: Both functions implemented and wired into Promise.allSettled array, plus inline CoachingData object
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Both functions query their respective tables and return data or null, CoachingData is a static object

tasks.name: Integrate loader into page component
tasks.purpose: Update the dashboard page component to call the loader and pass data to placeholder card slots

constraints: Must call requireUserInServerComponent to get user
Must call loadDashboardData(user.id)
Must pass loader data to grid component or individual cards
Must handle null data for each widget gracefully (empty states)
Must keep force-dynamic export and withI18n HOC from F1

tasks.input_state: page.tsx has grid with placeholder cards (from F1), loader is fully implemented with all 7 queries
tasks.output_state: page.tsx calls loader and passes data to each card slot, placeholder cards now receive real data types
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Page component calls loader and passes data to cards, typecheck passes
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'loadDashboardData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && grep -q 'requireUserInServerComponent' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck
